channel.title: Cybersecurity on jkt's blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Cybersecurity on jkt's blogs

item.title: My Journey Through Cybersecurity: Degree, Certifications, and Hands-on Labs
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Should you pursue a degree, stack certifications, or dive straight into practical experience? An honest breakdown from an aspiring offensive security professional.
